data.name: Mansion Affairs
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Mansion Affairs!

Plot Summary


After the death of Alex’s aunt, he inherits a grand mansion. However, there’s a catch—he must live in the mansion to fully claim his inheritance. As Alex and his wife Emma are on the verge of divorce, they decide to move in, hoping this change might help salvage their relationship. But things get complicated when Alex’s cousin Daniel and his wife Isabella, who have also inherited parts of the mansion, arrive. Now, the four of them must navigate their strained relationships while living under the same roof, setting the stage for the unfolding drama in Mansion Affairs.

Animations


What sets Mansion Affairs apart is its realistic animations.

Freedom to Explore



The game features a free roam mode, allowing you to explore the mansion and its surroundings at your own pace.

Choices matter


Whether you're deciding how to approach a situation or choosing between conflicting desires, your choices will shape the story and its consequences.

Multiple Protagonists


Experience the story from multiple angles by playing as both Emma and Alex.

Hot girls



The game features hot girls with diverse body types, from meaty to tall and thin.

Game Audio


Enjoy the game’s rich audio design, with music and sound effects that enhance the atmosphere and draw you further into the world of Mansion Affairs. The soundtrack complements the game’s tone perfectly, adding an extra layer of immersion.

data.short_description: Control Alex or Emma, exploring their wildest desires in a mansion full of secrets and hot encounters.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5 / AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2016 or newer Intel / AMD chipset
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia or ATi GPU with 2GB+ Memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: Processor: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or recent 64 bit Linux release
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD 64-bit capable processor
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間
